creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
Thanks for your offer. In essence you need to check out the ports tree via svn, change the port's Makefile and write your e-mail address in the MAINTAINER section. The best practice is to use the same email address for your Bugzilla account so we can track maintainer submissions and feedback automatically. Then submit the svn diff patch against the tree (best practice would be to run `svn diff security/zxid > patchfile` in the ports' root directory (eg. /usr/ports), as attachment to this PR.

The porter's handbook contains more info on maintaining ports:

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/book.html

Also this:

https://bitbucket.org/koobs/ports
